implemented: UUIDv7 administrator identity with normalized email, status, local password and roles
form login, CSRF, logout, session security and login throttling
Places domain entities, value objects and publication workflow
PostGIS, pg_trgm and unaccent migration from an empty PostgreSQL 18 database
geography(Point,4326), GiST, trigram, foreign key, join, age and opening-time indexes and constraints
deterministic five-city, six-category, fifteen-amenity and fifteen-place fixtures

architecture.placesPersistence: parameterized Doctrine DBAL with migration-owned schema
architecture.schemaValidationScope: ORM-managed Identity; DBAL-managed Places is verified by migration, constraints and PostGIS integration checks

findingsClosed: test database suffix corrected so isolated test credentials target family_places_test
PostGIS temporary init-server health race mitigated with a start period
DBAL fixture booleans normalized for PostgreSQL
fixtures explicitly truncate DBAL-managed catalogue tables for deterministic reloads
domain read interfaces added instead of suppressing PHPStan persistence-field findings
knownLimitations: Google subject is persisted but no Google authentication flow is implemented before C3
C2A exposes no public Places API; that belongs to C2B
Places schema is DBAL-managed and intentionally excluded from ORM schema diffing
externalConfigurationRequired: create production administrators explicitly with app:user:create-admin
supply production secrets and map provider configuration
nextAction: Commit and push C2A, verify clean worktree, then begin C2B.
